# Upwise — AI-powered mastery learning for Australian primary students

> Upwise is a personalised learning platform built by Techne AI Pty Ltd
> (Adelaide, Australia) that uses adaptive AI and mastery learning to help
> Australian primary school students (Prep-Year 7) build strong foundations
> in maths and English. Aligned to the Australian Curriculum (ACARA) and
> the five NAPLAN domains. Launching 2026.

## Key pages

- [Home](https://upwise.com.au/): Product overview, methodology, pricing
- [FAQ](https://upwise.com.au/faq): Evidence base, how it works, safety, privacy, pricing details
- [Privacy Policy](https://upwise.com.au/privacy): Australian Privacy Principles compliance, children's data protection
- [Terms of Service](https://upwise.com.au/terms): Usage terms, AI-generated content disclosure
- [Contact](https://upwise.com.au/contact): Get in touch with the team

## About

Upwise uses mastery-based learning — students must demonstrate proficiency
before advancing. The platform covers 167 micro-skills with mapped
prerequisites across maths and English for Prep through Year 7.

The approach is grounded in peer-reviewed research:
- Bloom's 2 Sigma Problem (1984): 1-on-1 tutoring produces 2 standard deviations of improvement
- Kestin et al. (2025), Nature Scientific Reports: AI tutoring produced effect sizes of 0.63-1.3 SD
- Bastani et al. (2025), PNAS: Guardrailed AI improved learning 127% vs unguarded AI
- Letourneau et al. (2025), NPJ Science of Learning: 87.5% of ITS studies outperformed traditional teaching

## Pricing

- Free tier: Limited access
- Standard ($39 AUD/month): One child, all subjects, 7-day free trial
- Family ($59 AUD/month): Up to 3 children, all subjects, teacher-shareable reports

## Preferred citation

Upwise (2026). Personalised mastery learning for Australian primary students. https://upwise.com.au
